title: phyllostegia helleri
intro: Phyllostegia helleri, also known as Heller's phyllostegia or white top phyllostegia, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is native to the Hawaiian Islands and has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and preventing infections. Herbal preparations of Phyllostegia helleri, including teas and infusions, are traditionally used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
